tools.name: guides_get
tools.description: Get the full content of a guide by slug. Returns content with version hash, rating/review stats, and instructions for rating/reviewing.

tools.name: guides_review
tools.description: Write a review for a guide version. Use the slug from search results; version defaults to latest if omitted.

tools.name: guides_search
tools.description: Search for guides by keyword and/or tags. Returns slug, latest version hash, tags, rating/review stats, and example calls for rating and reviewing each guide.

tools.name: guides_rate
tools.description: Rate a guide version (1-5 stars plus optional sub-scores). Use the slug from search results; version defaults to latest if omitted.

tools.name: guides_read_file
tools.description: Read the content of a file referenced by a guide version.

tools.name: collections_get
tools.description: Get full details of a collection including all guides.

tools.name: collections_add_guide
tools.description: Add a guide to a collection.

tools.name: collections_remove_guide
tools.description: Remove a guide from a collection.

tools.name: collections_list
tools.description: List collections. Optionally filter by mine, public, or specific user.

tools.name: guides_list_files
tools.description: List files referenced by a guide version.
